name: Mighty Mexican Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf frozen white bread dough, thawed
1/4 pound extra lean ground beef (or ground turkey)
1/2 cup shredded Low Fat Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Spray cookie sheets with Pam cooking spray and sprinkle evenly with 1-2 teaspoons of the cornmeal.
3. Divide dough into thirds and press or roll each into a 7-inch circle. Sprinkle evenly with the remaining cornmeal.
4. Press lightly into crusts and place on coated cookie sheets.
5. Prick crusts generously with a fork.
6. Bake at 450°F for 8 minutes. If crusts puff during baking, flatten slightly with a spoon.
7. Meanwhile, in a medium skillet, brown ground beef and onion until well-drained.
8. Add taco sauce and mix well.
9. Spread evenly over partially baked crusts.
10. Sprinkle with cheese and bake at 450°F for an additional 7-9 minutes or until cheese is melted and crusts are golden brown.
11. Top with lettuce and tomatoes.
12. Place 1 tablespoon of sour cream in the center of each pizza.
13. Sprinkle with green onions.
